issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The text checks if Leader has {Egghead} type, not if a card is on board.
Second effect (Rest action) is completely unrelated to card text. No resting effect is mentioned in the official card text. This appears to be from a different card.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is correct for '[Rush] during this turn', but verify consistency. This is acceptable.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] If your Leader has the {Egghead} type, this Character gains [Rush] during this turn. Then, your opponent adds 1 card from the top of their Life cards to their hand.
